name: State Street Spdr S&P/Asx 50 Etf
analysis: SFY's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$77.4800, stop A$73.9134, target A$88.1798 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
